chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-6815 of 2021 Shamsuddin Ahmed Khan Versus Federation of Pakistan & others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No.29445/2021 (stay). 2. For hearing of Main Case. 25.11.2021 Mr. Jawaid Farooqi, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Hussain Bohra, Assistant Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, Advocate undertakes to file vakalatnama on behalf of respondent department. This Petition was filed by impugning the recovery proceedings initiated by the respondent Department, during the pendency of the Appeal before the Commissioner Inland Revenue [Appeals-V] FBR Office, Karachi. The respective learned counsel jointly state that it may be just and proper to dispose of this petition with directions for expeditious conclusion of the appeal, while restraining the recovery of the impugned demand in the interim period. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of by directing the Commissioner Inland Revenue [Appeals-V] FBR Office, Karachi, to decide the pending Appeal preferably within 60 days from passing of this order. However, the respondents shall not take any coercive action against the petitioner, in respect of the impugned demand, till the conclusion of the Appeal. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
